name: splex-landing
description: Marketing landing page for Splex, served by the backend at the site root.

comments.overrides: @tailwindcss/vite declares vite as a peer (… || ^7 || ^8) while Astro 6 depends on vite ^7, so without this npm installs two vite majors side by side and the duplicate copies break the Tailwind plugin's native resolver. This forces a single vite version - which major doesn't matter (7 and 8 both build); a single copy is what fixes it. Remove once Astro's declared vite range covers the pinned major.
